name: convert-web-app
tagline: Guides turning an existing web app into a hybrid app that also runs as an MCP App inside MCP hosts.
verdict: Thorough hybrid-pattern walkthrough with strong before/after code examples, but SKILL.md runs past its size budget with duplicated pattern blocks, has no failure-handling guidance for build/install steps, no NOT-for scope note, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: `npm install @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps ...` unpinned, with 'Never specify version numbers from memory' (line 122).
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope section anywhere in description or body.
No handling anywhere for npm install, build, or basic-host connect failures across the multi-step flow.
